commands: npx tsx /private/tmp/nabimd-batch016-orchid-review.mts (252 frozen fixtures + 456 fresh probes)
stopConditions: Any candidate, fixture, engine-contract, verification, or manifest change invalidates this digest-bound evidence and requires a new Orchid review run.
Any reviewer disagreement or editorial rejection blocks publication of the immutable batch.
notes: Independent Orchid mechanical review passed. All 252 frozen fixtures and 456 Orchid-specific probes were evaluated through evaluateProblem. The fresh matrix emphasized exact root anatomy and order, root/child marker independence, valid and insufficient indentation, malformed and fenced-code/indented-code/blockquote/raw-HTML lookalikes, Unicode whitespace separators, case/spelling/prose neutrality, all seven direct checks per candidate, and priority-exact multi-failure cases. All 12 candidates have exactly one digest-bound verdict and no ID, content-variant, normalized-target, teaching-example, or vocabulary-signature collision with the 320 published problems.
